General.Name: MEDICLIN Aktiengesellschaft
General.Description: MEDICLIN Aktiengesellschaft operates hospitals in Germany. The company operates through Post-Acute, Acute, and Other Activities segments. It offers medical services in the areas of neurology, psychosomatics, orthopedics, internal medicine, cardiology, oncology, geriatrics, psychiatry, vascular medicine, otorhinolaryngology, cardiac medicine, rheumatology, pain medicine, trauma surgery, urology, and others. The company also provides services in the areas of ENT and acute outpatient services. It owns clinics, rehabilitation care, nursing care facilities, and medical care centers in German federal states. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Offenburg, Germany.
